name: Bean Pasta Primavera
recipeIngredient: Roasted red bell peppers (2, peeled and seeded)
recipeInstructions:
Spinach spaghetti (1 lb)
Broccoli (2 lbs)
Asparagus (1 lb)
Yellow peppers (3, large, with seeds removed and cut into long slivers)
Spinach (3 bunches, torn)
Basil leaves (1/2 cup, shredded)
Poppy seeds (1/2 cup)
Salt
Pepper
1. Combine beans, vegetable stock, and roasted peppers in a food processor. Blend until smooth and creamy. Fold in herbs, season with cayenne or paprika, salt, and pepper. Set aside.
2. Cook pasta according to package directions. Meanwhile, prepare vegetables: remove broccoli florets from stalks and cut into bite-sized pieces; peel broccoli stalks and cut diagonally into 1/4-inch thick slices; cut asparagus stalks diagonally into slices about 1 inch long; remove seeds from peppers and cut into long slivers.
3. Steam broccoli, asparagus, and peppers until tender-crisp (about 10 minutes), and steam spinach for 3-4 minutes. Cool and press out excess liquid before chopping coarsely.
4. Place pasta in a large warmed bowl. Add sauce, veggies, basil, poppy seeds, and remaining beans. Toss gently to mix. Season with salt and pepper. Garnish with sun-dried tomatoes.
